title: Functools, Operator Functions, Caching, and Dispatch · Effects Clinic: Wrapper Metadata
summary: Build reusable scoring functions without obscuring cache validity or dispatch behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp wrapper metadata increment in a measured callable utility and dispatch package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preserve wrapped function identity, signature, and documentation with update_wrapper or wraps.
Use operator callables when they make key extraction and composition more inspectable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from itertools import chain, islice

U = TypeVar('U')
